mnemonics: PRACTICE: Principles Realized through Action, Continuous Testing, Implementation, and Constant Evaluation
keyPoints: The core challenge is operationalizing abstract ethical principles into concrete technical requirements.
This requires interdisciplinary research combining ethics, social science, computer science, and law.
Methods include value-sensitive design, impact assessments, and participatory approaches involving diverse stakeholders.
commonMistakes: Assuming a set of principles can be translated into practice in a single, one-off process.
Focusing solely on technical solutions without considering the social and organizational context.
